narrative:
Cols 49-B (precinct in Franklin County) has 1,088 registered voters, with 63.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 16.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 19.9%, a modest Democratic lean of 3.5 percentage points.
